# Rafly-Wahyudi-
Link
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="id">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>i'm sorry, nanda 🌙</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Dancing+Script:wght@600;700&family=Quicksand:wght@300;400;500;600&family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
body{background:#02030c;min-height:100vh;font-family:'Quicksand',sans-serif;overflow-x:hidden;position:relative;}

.bg-layer{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:0;pointer-events:none;
  background:
    radial-gradient(ellipse 90% 50% at 50% -5%,rgba(80,60,180,0.30) 0%,transparent 65%),
    radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 50% at 12% 95%,rgba(255,140,60,0.16) 0%,transparent 60%),
    radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 50% at 88% 85%,rgba(90,40,180,0.22) 0%,transparent 60%),
    linear-gradient(180deg,#02030c 0%,#05061a 45%,#0a0820 100%);}

/* ══ FIREWORKS CANVAS (HD, multi-side) ══ */
#fwCanvas{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:3;pointer-events:none;width:100vw;height:100vh;}

/* ══ FLOATING EMBERS ══ */
.floating-hearts{position:fixed;inset:0;pointer-events:none;z-index:1;overflow:hidden;}
.fheart{position:absolute;opacity:0;animation:floatHeart linear infinite;}
@keyframes floatHeart{
  0%  {opacity:0;transform:translateY(0) scale(0.5);}
  10% {opacity:0.8;}
  90% {opacity:0.4;}
  100%{opacity:0;transform:translateY(-120vh) scale(1.1);}
}

/* ══ MUSIC BUTTON ══ */
.music-btn-wrap{
  position:fixed;bottom:32px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);
  z-index:20;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:8px;
  animation:fadeUp 0.9s ease 0.5s both;
}
.music-hint{
  font-family:'Quicksand',sans-serif;
  font-size:11px;letter-spacing:2.5px;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:#ffd6a0;font-weight:600;
  animation:hintPulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}
@keyframes hintPulse{0%,100%{opacity:0.5;transform:translateY(0);}50%{opacity:1;transform:translateY(-3px);}}
.hint-arrow{font-size:14px;display:block;text-align:center;animation:arrowBounce 1.2s ease-in-out infinite;}
@keyframes arrowBounce{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0);}50%{transform:translateY(5px);}}
.music-btn{
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:6px;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(30,15,60,0.75),rgba(15,8,35,0.85));
  backdrop-filter:blur(18px);
  border:1.5px solid rgba(255,176,102,0.55);
  border-radius:24px;padding:18px 32px;
  color:#ffd6a0;cursor:pointer;
  box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.5),0 0 18px rgba(255,176,102,0.15);
  animation:btnGlow 2.4s ease-in-out infinite;
  min-width:160px;
}
.music-btn:active{transform:scale(0.96);}
@keyframes btnGlow{
  0%,100%{box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.5),0 0 18px rgba(255,176,102,0.15);}
  50%{box-shadow:0 8px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.5),0 0 36px rgba(255,176,102,0.55),0 0 60px rgba(155,140,255,0.25);}
}
.music-btn .note{font-size:32px;display:inline-block;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 10px rgba(255,176,102,0.8));}
.music-btn .note.playing{animation:noteBounce 0.8s ease-in-out infinite;}
@keyframes noteBounce{0%,100%{transform:scale(1) rotate(-5deg);}50%{transform:scale(1.2) rotate(5deg);}}
.music-btn-label{font-family:'Quicksand',sans-serif;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:#ffd6a0;}
.music-btn-sub{font-size:10px;letter-spacing:1px;color:#c9bdff;opacity:0.7;font-weight:500;}
#ytPlayerWrap{position:fixed;width:200px;height:200px;overflow:hidden;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;top:-9999px;left:-9999px;}

/* ══ PAGE ══ */
.page-wrapper{position:relative;z-index:5;max-width:480px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 0 0;}
.header{padding:55px 24px 20px;text-align:center;}
.header-deco{font-size:12px;letter-spacing:6px;text-transform:uppercase;color:#ffb066;font-weight:600;opacity:0.8;animation:fadeDown 0.6s ease both;}
.name-main{font-family:'Dancing Script',cursive;font-size:54px;font-weight:700;line-height:1.05;margin:10px 0 6px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#ffb066,#ffd6a0,#9b8cff,#ffb066);background-size:200% auto;-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;animation:fadeDown 0.7s ease 0.1s both,shimmer 4s linear infinite;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 22px rgba(255,176,102,0.55));}
@keyframes shimmer{to{background-position:200% center;}}
.name-sub{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:13px;letter-spacing:6px;text-transform:uppercase;color:#c9bdff;opacity:0.55;animation:fadeDown 0.8s ease 0.2s both;}
.divider{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:12px;margin:22px 24px;animation:fadeDown 0.9s ease 0.3s both;}
.divider-line{flex:1;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(255,176,102,0.5),transparent);}

.main-photo-section{padding:0 24px;animation:fadeUp 0.8s ease 0.3s both;}
.photo-card-wrapper{position:relative;padding:3px;border-radius:35px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#ffb066,#7a5cff,#ffd6a0,#ffb066);background-size:300% 300%;animation:borderPulse 4s ease infinite;}
@keyframes borderPulse{0%,100%{background-position:0% 50%;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 14px rgba(255,176,102,0.55));}50%{background-position:100% 50%;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 30px rgba(122,92,255,0.75));}}
.photo-card{position:relative;border-radius:32px;overflow:hidden;}
.photo-card::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:2;pointer-events:none;background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(0,0,0,0.08) 0%,transparent 30%,transparent 55%,rgba(10,5,30,0.65) 100%);}
.photo-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:3px;background:rgba(255,176,102,0.2);width:100%;aspect-ratio:3/4;}
.photo-cell{overflow:hidden;position:relative;}
.photo-cell img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block;animation:photoDrift 9s ease-in-out infinite;}
.photo-cell:nth-child(2) img{animation-duration:10.5s;animation-delay:0.4s;}
@keyframes photoDrift{
  0%,100%{transform:scale(1.04) translate(0,0);}
  50%{transform:scale(1.10) translate(-1.5%,-1%);}
}
.photo-tint{position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(122,92,255,0.08),rgba(255,176,102,0.08));mix-blend-mode:multiply;}
.card-bottom-overlay{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;padding:35px 22px 22px;background:linear-gradient(0deg,rgba(10,5,30,0.82) 0%,transparent 100%);z-index:3;display:flex;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:space-between;}
.card-name-overlay{font-family:'Dancing Script',cursive;color:white;font-size:26px;font-weight:700;text-shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);}
.card-tagline{font-size:10px;color:rgba(255,214,160,0.85);letter-spacing:2px;font-weight:600;margin-top:3px;}
.card-heart{font-size:24px;animation:heartbeat 1.4s ease-in-out infinite;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(255,176,102,0.8));}
@keyframes heartbeat{0%,100%{transform:scale(1);}30%{transform:scale(1.28);}60%{transform:scale(1.08);}}

.bio-card{margin:24px 24px 0;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);border-radius:24px;padding:24px;border:1px solid rgba(255,176,102,0.22);box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(80,50,180,0.2);animation:fadeUp 0.8s ease 0.6s both;}
.bio-quote{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:15.5px;font-style:italic;color:#ffd6a0;line-height:1.8;text-align:center;}
.bio-quote::before{content:'❝ ';color:#ffb066;}
.bio-quote::after{content:' ❞';color:#ffb066;}

.love-card{margin:20px 24px 0;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);border-radius:28px;padding:32px 28px;border:1.5px solid rgba(255,176,102,0.3);box-shadow:0 8px 40px rgba(80,50,180,0.25),inset 0 1px 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.06);animation:fadeUp 0.8s ease 0.7s both;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.love-card::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;background:radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 50% at 50% 0%,rgba(255,176,102,0.12) 0%,transparent 70%);}
.love-from{font-size:11px;letter-spacing:4px;text-transform:uppercase;color:#ffb066;opacity:0.85;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:16px;text-align:center;}
.love-icons{text-align:center;font-size:22px;margin-bottom:14px;letter-spacing:6px;}
.love-text{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:15px;font-style:italic;color:#f0e8ff;line-height:2.1;text-align:center;text-shadow:0 1px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);}
.love-text .highlight{color:#ffb066;font-weight:700;font-style:normal;font-size:16.5px;}
.love-sign{margin-top:22px;text-align:right;font-family:'Dancing Script',cursive;font-size:26px;color:#ffb066;font-weight:700;}
.love-icons-bottom{text-align:center;font-size:20px;margin-top:16px;letter-spacing:5px;}

.tags-section{padding:20px 24px 0;animation:fadeUp 0.8s ease 0.8s both;}
.tags-wrap{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;justify-content:center;}
.tag-pill{padding:9px 20px;border-radius:50px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;cursor:default;transition:transform 0.2s,box-shadow 0.2s;}
.tag-pill:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);}
.tag-solid{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#7a5cff,#ffb066);color:white;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(255,176,102,0.35);}
.tag-outline{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);color:#ffd6a0;border:1.5px solid rgba(255,176,102,0.35);}

/* ══ LILY SVG (night-tinted) ══ */
.lily-scene{
  position:relative;z-index:2;
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;
  margin:30px 0 0;
  padding-bottom:10px;
  overflow:visible;
}
.lily-svg-wrap{
  position:relative;
  width:200px;
  animation:lilySway 5s ease-in-out infinite;
  transform-origin:bottom center;
}
@keyframes lilySway{
  0%,100%{transform:rotate(-3deg);}
  25%   {transform:rotate(2.5deg);}
  50%   {transform:rotate(-1.5deg);}
  75%   {transform:rotate(3deg);}
}
.p1{animation:pWobble1 5s ease-in-out infinite;transform-origin:100px 110px;}
.p2{animation:pWobble2 5.3s ease-in-out infinite;transform-origin:100px 110px;}
.p3{animation:pWobble3 4.7s ease-in-out infinite;transform-origin:100px 112px;}
.p4{animation:pWobble4 5.1s ease-in-out infinite;transform-origin:100px 110px;}
.p5{animation:pWobble5 4.9s ease-in-out infinite;transform-origin:100px 108px;}
.p6{animation:pWobble6 5.2s ease-in-out infinite;transform-origin:100px 108px;}
@keyframes pWobble1{0%,100%{transform:rotate(0deg);}50%{transform:rotate(3deg);}}
@keyframes pWobble2{0%,100%{transform:rotate(0deg);}50%{transform:rotate(-3deg);}}
@keyframes pWobble3{0%,100%{transform:rotate(0deg) scale(1);}50%{transform:rotate(1deg) scale(1.015);}}
@keyframes pWobble4{0%,100%{transform:rotate(0deg);}50%{transform:rotate(-1.5deg);}}
@keyframes pWobble5{0%,100%{transform:rotate(0deg);}50%{transform:rotate(2.5deg);}}
@keyframes pWobble6{0%,100%{transform:rotate(0deg);}50%{transform:rotate(-2.5deg);}}
.tulip-head{animation:headSway 5s ease-in-out infinite;transform-origin:100px 130px;}
@keyframes headSway{0%,100%{transform:rotate(-2deg);}50%{transform:rotate(2deg);}}
.stamen{animation:stamenPulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;}
@keyframes stamenPulse{0%,100%{opacity:1;}50%{opacity:0.6;}}
.leaf-l{animation:leafL 6s ease-in-out infinite;transform-origin:right bottom;}
.leaf-r{animation:leafR 5.5s ease-in-out infinite;transform-origin:left bottom;}
@keyframes leafL{0%,100%{transform:rotate(-4deg);}50%{transform:rotate(3deg);}}
@keyframes leafR{0%,100%{transform:rotate(4deg);}50%{transform:rotate(-3deg);}}
.dew{animation:dewGlint 3s ease-in-out infinite;}
@keyframes dewGlint{0%,100%{opacity:0.3;}50%{opacity:0.9;}}
.lily-caption{text-align:center;margin-top:10px;font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:13px;font-style:italic;color:#c9bdff;opacity:0.6;letter-spacing:1px;}

.footer{position:relative;z-index:2;text-align:center;padding:16px 24px 50px;}
.footer-name{font-family:'Dancing Script',cursive;font-size:20px;color:#ffb066;opacity:0.6;}

@keyframes fadeDown{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(-20px);}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}}
@keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(30px);}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="bg-layer"></div>
<canvas id="fwCanvas"></canvas>
<div class="floating-hearts" id="hearts"></div>

<div class="music-btn-wrap">
  <p class="music-hint">✦ tap untuk nyalakan musik ✦</p>
  <span class="hint-arrow">↓</span>
  <button class="music-btn" id="musicBtn" type="button">
    <span class="note" id="musicNote">🎵</span>
    <span class="music-btn-label" id="musicLabel">Putar lagu</span>
    <span class="music-btn-sub">Hopelessly Devoted to You</span>
  </button>
</div>
<audio id="bgAudio" preload="auto" src="data:audio/mpeg;base64,
